---
name: False positive
about: The skill flagged something it shouldn't have
title: "[False positive] "
labels: false-positive
---

**What did the skill flag?**

Quote the finding from the output or describe what was flagged.

**Why is this incorrect?**

Briefly explain. If you can point to the source file(s) the skill was reading, even better.

**Skill version**

Release tag or commit hash.

**Anything else?**
